text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Narita Taishin in front of the academy
gates, but she seems a little deflated.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I've been getting through my races fine, so what
are you complaining about? I'm not some
weakling!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Shut it. I don't need you sticking your nose in my
business!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(What's wrong with me? I'm so tired and moody,
and I'm lashing out at everyone.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Maybe I am feeling down... I should rest a little...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We part ways, but Narita Taishin is in low spirits
as she slinks off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her exhaustion must be catching up to her. Looks
like I need to rethink her race schedule.
